query: SELECT id, name, category_id, store_id FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 AND (name LIKE 'Halloween%' OR name LIKE 'Spooked%' OR name LIKE 'Trick%' OR name LIKE 'trick%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, category_id, store_id FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 AND (name LIKE 'Halloween%' OR name LIKE 'Spooked%' OR name LIKE 'Trick%' OR name LIKE 'trick%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 50;
